name: Day Out With Thomas (TM)
description: -Special Offers are not applicable for all train ride times. Most access codes are generally for Thomas train tickets only -Member must be present and show valid membership card upon admission for all tickets that utilize the Member Discount. -Site Hours 8am-5:00pm -Event is rain or shine. -The time on your Thomas ticket is your train departure time -Thomas Tickets are valid for the departure date/time printed on the ticket only; however your ticket permits you entry to the venue between 8am-5pm to enjoy the other activities offered -Thomas passenger cars are closed cars with two rows of seating and air conditioning. Percy passenger cars are closed historic cars with two rows of seating. -Arrive at least one hour early, driving times are unpredictable, make sure to plan plenty of time. - Be in the Thomas Boarding line at least 30 minutes before your scheduled departure. Thomas boarding will stop 15 minutes before to ensure all passengers are safely seated. - Guests who miss their train will be rebooked to the train with the next available seating (this does not mean the next departure) -Ages 1 year and above require a ticket, under 1 will not have their own seat. -Wheelchair lifts are available for both Thomas and Percy upon request, please inform an attendant upon arrival -If a guest has a disability that prohibits them from standing in line, please see our Information Booth to receive a priority boarding pass which will allow the guest to join the pre-board tent 20 minutes before their scheduled departure. Guests must be in the boarding tent 30 minutes before departure; boarding stops 15 minutes prior to each departure. -All sales are final, no refunds. RULES/RESTRICTIONS (E.g. no cameras, video, outside food or beverage) No food or beverage allowed on the passenger cars or trolleys. Alcohol is NOT allowed on the premises. Video and photographs may be taken for personal use only. Professional photographers must check in with the museum and obtain a license.

All Tickets are Non-Refundable. All Tickets are Non-Transferrable. A NON-REFUNDABLE service charge will be added to the purchase price of each ticket - in the instance of a show cancellation, this fee will not be returned. Parking is available on the street with no permit restrictions or meters; DO NOT park in business or mini-mall lots or you will be towed. NO Filming or Audio Recording without written consent from the performing artist Outside food and/or drink is not allowed. Enjoy dinner at our restaurant BABYGOLD BARBECUE before the show or inside both The Club & Sidebar. description: The Skywalk elevator in the A&E Parking Garage is currently under renovation. Passenger drop off at the top of the valet ramp is also available, with early arrival encouraged for use. Plan your visit before you go to the show for info on parking using the ParkMobile app, dining experiences including the Nicklaus Children's Health System Intermezzo Lounge and our food and drink options in the lobby. Such elements may aggravate certain medical or physical conditions, and guests should take into consideration if they have a history of discomfort or physical symptoms when experiencing these elements. name: Day Out With Thomas (TM), Thomas & Friends
description: -Special Offers are not applicable for all train ride times. Most access codes are generally for Thomas train tickets only -Member must be present and show valid membership card upon admission for all tickets that utilize the Member Discount. -Site Hours 8am-5:00pm -Event is rain or shine. -The time on your Thomas ticket is your train departure time -Thomas Tickets are valid for the departure date/time printed on the ticket only; however your ticket permits you entry to the venue between 8am-5pm to enjoy the other activities offered -Thomas passenger cars are closed cars with two rows of seating and air conditioning. Percy passenger cars are closed historic cars with two rows of seating. -Arrive at least one hour early, driving times are unpredictable, make sure to plan plenty of time. - Be in the Thomas Boarding line at least 30 minutes before your scheduled departure. Thomas boarding will stop 15 minutes before to ensure all passengers are safely seated. - Guests who miss their train will be rebooked to the train with the next available seating (this does not mean the next departure) -Ages 1 year and above require a ticket, under 1 will not have their own seat. -Wheelchair lifts are available for both Thomas and Percy upon request, please inform an attendant upon arrival -If a guest has a disability that prohibits them from standing in line, please see our Information Booth to receive a priority boarding pass which will allow the guest to join the pre-board tent 20 minutes before their scheduled departure. Guests must be in the boarding tent 30 minutes before departure; boarding stops 15 minutes prior to each departure. -All sales are final, no refunds. RULES/RESTRICTIONS (E.g. no cameras, video, outside food or beverage) No food or beverage allowed on the passenger cars or trolleys. Alcohol is NOT allowed on the premises. Video and photographs may be taken for personal use only. Professional photographers must check in with the museum and obtain a license.

name: Day Out With Thomas (TM), Thomas & Friends
description: -Special Offers are not applicable for all train ride times. Most access codes are generally for Thomas train tickets only -Member must be present and show valid membership card upon admission for all tickets that utilize the Member Discount. -Site Hours 8am-5:00pm -Event is rain or shine. -The time on your Thomas ticket is your train departure time -Thomas Tickets are valid for the departure date/time printed on the ticket only; however your ticket permits you entry to the venue between 8am-5pm to enjoy the other activities offered -Thomas passenger cars are closed cars with two rows of seating and air conditioning. Percy passenger cars are closed historic cars with two rows of seating. -Arrive at least one hour early, driving times are unpredictable, make sure to plan plenty of time. - Be in the Thomas Boarding line at least 30 minutes before your scheduled departure. Thomas boarding will stop 15 minutes before to ensure all passengers are safely seated. - Guests who miss their train will be rebooked to the train with the next available seating (this does not mean the next departure) -Ages 1 year and above require a ticket, under 1 will not have their own seat. -Wheelchair lifts are available for both Thomas and Percy upon request, please inform an attendant upon arrival -If a guest has a disability that prohibits them from standing in line, please see our Information Booth to receive a priority boarding pass which will allow the guest to join the pre-board tent 20 minutes before their scheduled departure. Guests must be in the boarding tent 30 minutes before departure; boarding stops 15 minutes prior to each departure. -All sales are final, no refunds. RULES/RESTRICTIONS (E.g. no cameras, video, outside food or beverage) No food or beverage allowed on the passenger cars or trolleys. Alcohol is NOT allowed on the premises. Video and photographs may be taken for personal use only. Professional photographers must check in with the museum and obtain a license.

name: Burnout Paradise
description: Accessibility: The main lobby of the theatre is located 8 steps below street level. To transport guests to the lobby comfortably and safely, we use a specialized LiftKar Stair Climber. If you need assistance when you arrive, our security staff-stationed outside and trained in operating the LiftKar-will safely accompany you down the stairs. Once you're in the main lobby, you'll find all public areas and amenities-including restrooms, box office, concessions, and wheelchair-accessible seating - are accessible. Some rows in the Orchestra section may require you to navigate an additional 1 to 4 steps once inside the theatre. Our mezzanine is located up 26 steps and is not wheelchair-accessible. For more information and details on the LiftKar Stair Climber and accessible seating at the Astor Place Theatre, please visit https://www.astorplacetheatre.com/ada. If you have any questions or need to discuss your specific needs, please reach out to us at accessibility@astorplacetheatre.com.

description: What You Need to Know We have partnered with the Mason / O'Farrell garage, located 1/2-block across the street from Hotel Nikko with entrances on both Mason and O'Farrell. They offer Feinstein's patrons a validated rate of $15 for five-hours of parking when your ticket is stamped by a Feinstein's host! There are no refunds or exchanges except in specific circumstance. Please email Feinsteins@hotenikkosf.com with questions. We charge $10 for ticket exchanges to a different day of a specific performers run, if exchanging for another time we will issue a refund to you, we do not transfer OR store credit, either the value of tickets or actual tickets, To exchange your ticket: Please "purchase" the amount of tickets you need to exchange. Once completed, your original order will be exchanged within 24-hours. You will receive an updated confirmation email from Ticketweb with a new order number. https://bit.ly/FeinsteinsTicketExchangePurchase For questions, please email feinsteins@hotelnikkosf.com. At this time Feinstein's at the Nikko is following the guidelines and recommendations as set forth by the city of San Francisco and the state of California in regards to masking and vaccinations. We honor your personal choice of whether to wear a mask, and leave it up to the guest's discretion. Please note: while rare, some artist's may request that their audience stay masked during their show. We will alert audience members in advance should any visiting artist request masking. For further information - https://www.feinsteinssf.com/safety-protocols/

name: Mamma Mia Drag Brunch
description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. Seating: All seating is first come, first served at Management's discretion. All tables, including VIP, are generally shared seating. If you would like a private 4-person table, you must purchase all 4 seats. Otherwise, you may be seated with another party. Group Requests: If you would like to be seated with another party, please make a note in the comments section at checkout, call our Box Office during business hours, or email denver.boxoffice@improv.com. While we do our best to accommodate, we cannot guarantee group seating unless your entire party arrives together. For best results, please meet in the lobby before entering the showroom. Late Arrivals & Re-entry: To ensure the best experience for all guests and performers, doors close 30 minutes after showtime. Late arrivals or guests who exit the building after entry will not be readmitted. No exceptions. All Sales Are Final: No refunds. No exchanges. No exceptions. 2-Item Minimum: There is a two-item minimum per person inside the showroom (food or drink). PLEASE NOTE: Any disruptive behavior may result in immediate ejection from the venue without warning or refund. Examples of disruptive behavior include, but are not limited to: Heckling or interrupting the show Excessive talking at your table Refusing to share your table (if all 4 seats were not purchased together) Smoking or vaping indoors Aggressive, inappropriate, or disrespectful conduct towards staff or other guests Unauthorized photography or video recording Unauthorized live streaming of any kind Photo/Video/Streaming: Permission for photos or recordings is at the sole discretion of the General Manager. Please check with management before taking any media during the show. Thank you for helping us create a respectful and enjoyable environment for all guests and performers.

description: Everyone must have a ticket to attend the performance. No children under the age of 5 will be admitted. Guests under 14 years old must be accompanied by an adult chaperone. Recommended for ages 13 and up. This theatre does not have an elevator. Doors open 1 hour before showtime. Bag check will be conducted at the entrance. Please allow extra time for security screening. name: The Wizard of Oz at Sphere
description: This film experience begins at the time listed on your ticket. There is no late seating permitted for this event. Doors open 45 minutes before the time listed on your ticket. This event is an immersive experience with various elements, that may include seat haptics, movement sensations, flashing lights, intense lighting, visual effects, loud noises, falling and flying objects, projectiles, pyrotechnics and atmospheric simulations such as fog, scent, mist and wind. Such elements may aggravate certain medical or physical conditions, and guests should take into consideration if they have a history of discomfort or physical symptoms when experiencing these elements. If you have any concerns and/or are pregnant, you should consult with your physician prior to attending an immersive experience. Event content, dates, times, prices, and availability subject to change. Tickets are non-refundable. There is a 25 ticket limit per purchase per calendar year. All guests require a ticket.

name: FourFour Send
description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. FAQ: *WILL CALL CUSTOMERS* - Will Call pick up is located at the Door when doors open, night of show (*NOTE: Will Call never closes), you'll just need to show your I.D. **PLEASE NOTE: The time listed on the ticket is the time when doors open, not when the performance starts. For up to date set times, check www.twitter.com/MidEastClub or call our Box Office Hotline at 1-617-864-3278 and enter *100 at the prompt. TERMS AND CONDITIONS: NO VAPING OR SMOKING IN THE BUILDING I understand that my email address will be added to the venue and/or promoter's email update list and I know that I am welcome to unsubscribe at any time. I understand that VALID I.D. is required for entry for events that are 18+ or 21+ and that if I do not provide a VALID I.D. I will be denied admission. I understand that for All Ages events VALID I.D. is only required by anyone over 21 who wishes to purchase or consume alcohol, regardless of apparent age - NO EXCEPTIONS. I understand that if I am over 21 and do not provide valid I.D., I will not be served alcohol. I understand that anyone who consumes alcohol without having provided proper I.D. or is under 21 will be ejected from the venue without refund. I understand that, per order of the City of Cambridge, only the following forms of I.D. are considered valid: * a current US- or Canada-issued driver's license, * a current Massachusetts liquor I.D., * a current US Military I.D., or * a current Passport. I understand that student I.D.'s and foreign driver's licenses are NOT considered valid. I understand that if I try to use a student I.D. or foreign driver's license, I will be denied admission. I realize that this I.D. policy is required by law and not subject to staff discretion.

name: Day Out With Thomas (TM)
description: -Special Offers are not applicable for all train ride times. Most access codes are generally for Thomas train tickets only -Member must be present and show valid membership card upon admission for all tickets that utilize the Member Discount. -Site Hours 8am-5:00pm -Event is rain or shine. -The time on your Thomas ticket is your train departure time -Thomas Tickets are valid for the departure date/time printed on the ticket only; however your ticket permits you entry to the venue between 8am-5pm to enjoy the other activities offered -Thomas passenger cars are closed cars with two rows of seating and air conditioning. Percy passenger cars are closed historic cars with two rows of seating. -Arrive at least one hour early, driving times are unpredictable, make sure to plan plenty of time. - Be in the Thomas Boarding line at least 30 minutes before your scheduled departure. Thomas boarding will stop 15 minutes before to ensure all passengers are safely seated. - Guests who miss their train will be rebooked to the train with the next available seating (this does not mean the next departure) -Ages 1 year and above require a ticket, under 1 will not have their own seat. -Wheelchair lifts are available for both Thomas and Percy upon request, please inform an attendant upon arrival -If a guest has a disability that prohibits them from standing in line, please see our Information Booth to receive a priority boarding pass which will allow the guest to join the pre-board tent 20 minutes before their scheduled departure. Guests must be in the boarding tent 30 minutes before departure; boarding stops 15 minutes prior to each departure. -All sales are final, no refunds. RULES/RESTRICTIONS (E.g. no cameras, video, outside food or beverage) No food or beverage allowed on the passenger cars or trolleys. Alcohol is NOT allowed on the premises. Video and photographs may be taken for personal use only. Professional photographers must check in with the museum and obtain a license.

All bags larger than 10 in x 9 in, backpacks, professional cameras (i.e detachable lenses), video equipment, luggage, & like articles are strictly prohibited. Any medication must be accompanied with proof of prescription. Guests are prohibited from bringing weapons. Weapons include, but are not limited to, the following: firearms, explosives, stun guns, handcuffs, brass knuckles, sticks, clubs, batons, & knives. Patrons with prohibited articles will be turned away at the entrances and no storage or check area will be provided. Violation of the above will result in EJECTION.

name: Day Out With Thomas (TM)
description: -Special Offers are not applicable for all train ride times. Most access codes are generally for Thomas train tickets only -Member must be present and show valid membership card upon admission for all tickets that utilize the Member Discount. -Site Hours 8am-5:00pm -Event is rain or shine. -The time on your Thomas ticket is your train departure time -Thomas Tickets are valid for the departure date/time printed on the ticket only; however your ticket permits you entry to the venue between 8am-5pm to enjoy the other activities offered -Thomas passenger cars are closed cars with two rows of seating and air conditioning. Percy passenger cars are closed historic cars with two rows of seating. -Arrive at least one hour early, driving times are unpredictable, make sure to plan plenty of time. - Be in the Thomas Boarding line at least 30 minutes before your scheduled departure. Thomas boarding will stop 15 minutes before to ensure all passengers are safely seated. - Guests who miss their train will be rebooked to the train with the next available seating (this does not mean the next departure) -Ages 1 year and above require a ticket, under 1 will not have their own seat. -Wheelchair lifts are available for both Thomas and Percy upon request, please inform an attendant upon arrival -If a guest has a disability that prohibits them from standing in line, please see our Information Booth to receive a priority boarding pass which will allow the guest to join the pre-board tent 20 minutes before their scheduled departure. Guests must be in the boarding tent 30 minutes before departure; boarding stops 15 minutes prior to each departure. -All sales are final, no refunds. RULES/RESTRICTIONS (E.g. no cameras, video, outside food or beverage) No food or beverage allowed on the passenger cars or trolleys. Alcohol is NOT allowed on the premises. Video and photographs may be taken for personal use only. Professional photographers must check in with the museum and obtain a license.

name: Sunday Spotlight with The Springs
description: ***Please note, when you make a reservation at The Bluebird Cafe, you are agreeing to the following terms & conditions: - Ticket reservations at The Bluebird Cafe are an agreement to pay the cover charge and applicable taxes/fees and to meet the $15.00 per seat food and/or drink minimum. - If you are a no show, we reserve the right to charge your credit card for the $15.00 minimum for each seat in your reservation. - Ticket reservations are for your personal use. They are NOT transferrable and NOT for resale! We perform random I.D. checks and the name on the reservation must match the name on the I.D. - Cancel at least 48 hours before showtime to receive a refund of the ticket price and tax (ticketing fees are non-refundable). Please call (615-383-1461) or email (info@bluebirdcafe.com) to cancel your reservation. - Attendees are expected to show up by the start of the show for which they have tickets. Seats that are unclaimed once the show has started will be seated from the walk-up line. - Performers are subject to change. - Bar seats are only for customers 21 years of age or older. - Any guest under the age of 18 must be seated with a parent or guardian. - We require accessible seat requests to be made two weeks in advance of the show date for guaranteed accessible seats. If you made a reservation outside of that window using our online system, please call The Bluebird Cafe during office hours and we will do our best to accommodate your needs. Please know that if you reserved outside of the two week window, accessible seats are not guaranteed. - The Bluebird Cafe is a listening room. If you do not honor our SHHHH! policy (being quiet while the performers are on stage) you may be asked to leave. - No outside food and/or drink is allowed inside the venue. - Still photography is allowed, unless the artist requests otherwise. - RECORDING COPYRIGHTED MATERIAL (VIDEO OR AUDIO) IS PROHIBITED. - We have a small lot directly in front of the cafe and a larger gravel lot behind the cafe. To access our gravel lot, please use the alley entrance on Hillsboro Pike next to United Community Bank. Please do not utilize our neighbors' parking lots, as they enforce towing and do NOT park at the bank unless after 4:30 PM. All guests must enter and check in through our main entrance on Hillsboro Pike. - For the safety and comfort of all our guests, Bluebird Cafe management has the right to refuse service to anyone who is aggressive, hostile or appears to be intoxicated.

name: Santi Espinosa - ESPANGLISH (English/Spanish Show)
description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. name: One Night of Queen
description: ONE NIGHT OF QUEEN: A Tribute Performed By Gary Mullen & The Works returns with a brand new show, paying homage to Queen?s legendary ?Magic Tour,? their final tour with Freddie Mercury which was never played in the USA. Complete with accurate costumes, staging, lighting and set list, this show is certainly ?A Kind Of Magic!? For over 20 years, Gary Mullen & The Works have been performing their worldrenowned ONE NIGHT OF QUEEN live concert, featuring Gary Mullen on vocals, David Brockett on guitar, Malcolm Gentles on keyboards, Jon Halliwell on drums and Alan McGeoch on bass guitar. The band will have you dancing in the aisles as they present the stage theatrics, showmanship, and music of arguably the greatest rock band of all time: QUEEN!

name: Burnout Paradise
description: Accessibility: The main lobby of the theatre is located 8 steps below street level. To transport guests to the lobby comfortably and safely, we use a specialized LiftKar Stair Climber. If you need assistance when you arrive, our security staff-stationed outside and trained in operating the LiftKar-will safely accompany you down the stairs. Once you're in the main lobby, you'll find all public areas and amenities-including restrooms, box office, concessions, and wheelchair-accessible seating - are accessible. Some rows in the Orchestra section may require you to navigate an additional 1 to 4 steps once inside the theatre. Our mezzanine is located up 26 steps and is not wheelchair-accessible. For more information and details on the LiftKar Stair Climber and accessible seating at the Astor Place Theatre, please visit https://www.astorplacetheatre.com/ada. If you have any questions or need to discuss your specific needs, please reach out to us at accessibility@astorplacetheatre.com.

description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. FAQ: *WILL CALL CUSTOMERS* - Will Call pick up is located at the Door when doors open, night of show (*NOTE: Will Call never closes), you'll just need to show your I.D. **PLEASE NOTE: The time listed on the ticket is the time when doors open, not when the performance starts. For up to date set times, check www.twitter.com/MidEastClub or call our Box Office Hotline at 1-617-864-3278 and enter *100 at the prompt. TERMS AND CONDITIONS: NO VAPING OR SMOKING IN THE BUILDING I understand that my email address will be added to the venue and/or promoter's email update list and I know that I am welcome to unsubscribe at any time. I understand that VALID I.D. is required for entry for events that are 18+ or 21+ and that if I do not provide a VALID I.D. I will be denied admission. I understand that for All Ages events VALID I.D. is only required by anyone over 21 who wishes to purchase or consume alcohol, regardless of apparent age - NO EXCEPTIONS. I understand that if I am over 21 and do not provide valid I.D., I will not be served alcohol. I understand that anyone who consumes alcohol without having provided proper I.D. or is under 21 will be ejected from the venue without refund. I understand that, per order of the City of Cambridge, only the following forms of I.D. are considered valid: * a current US- or Canada-issued driver's license, * a current Massachusetts liquor I.D., * a current US Military I.D., or * a current Passport. I understand that student I.D.'s and foreign driver's licenses are NOT considered valid. I understand that if I try to use a student I.D. or foreign driver's license, I will be denied admission. I realize that this I.D. policy is required by law and not subject to staff discretion.

name: Tyler Fischer
description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. Seating: All seating is first come, first served at Management's discretion. All tables, including VIP, are generally shared seating. If you would like a private 4-person table, you must purchase all 4 seats. Otherwise, you may be seated with another party. Group Requests: If you would like to be seated with another party, please make a note in the comments section at checkout, call our Box Office during business hours, or email denver.boxoffice@improv.com. While we do our best to accommodate, we cannot guarantee group seating unless your entire party arrives together. For best results, please meet in the lobby before entering the showroom. Late Arrivals & Re-entry: To ensure the best experience for all guests and performers, doors close 30 minutes after showtime. Late arrivals or guests who exit the building after entry will not be readmitted. No exceptions. All Sales Are Final: No refunds. No exchanges. No exceptions. 2-Item Minimum: There is a two-item minimum per person inside the showroom (food or drink). PLEASE NOTE: Any disruptive behavior may result in immediate ejection from the venue without warning or refund. Examples of disruptive behavior include, but are not limited to: Heckling or interrupting the show Excessive talking at your table Refusing to share your table (if all 4 seats were not purchased together) Smoking or vaping indoors Aggressive, inappropriate, or disrespectful conduct towards staff or other guests Unauthorized photography or video recording Unauthorized live streaming of any kind Photo/Video/Streaming: Permission for photos or recordings is at the sole discretion of the General Manager. Please check with management before taking any media during the show. Thank you for helping us create a respectful and enjoyable environment for all guests and performers.

name: COMEDY FOR LIFE: Graduation Night
description: This event is 21 and over. Any ticket holder unable to present valid identification indicating that they are at least 21 years of age will not be admitted to this event, and will not be eligible for a refund. * Ages 21+ and Older. * All sales are final. No refunds. * 2-item minimum purchase required * The lineup is subject to change without notice. * We reserve the right to refuse entry to any person who is either under the influence of ANY substance or causes a disturbance of any kind. * Late arrivals (after the show has begun) for parties of 2 or more are not guaranteed to be seated together. * Late arrivals for groups of 4 or more are not guaranteed seating together unless half the party is already seated or VIP booth/stage seating has been reserved. * Because our shows are in such high demand, we are not able to hold seats after the show starts. Ticket holders should be checked in or in line by showtime. Once the show has started, your seat may not be held. Any open seats will be made available to standby customers. All late arrivals or unclaimed tickets will be void and non-refundable. * Only tickets purchased directly from The Stand Up Comedy Club will be honored. We do not support or honor tickets obtained from third parties or scalpers. Any resale, attempted resale, or exchange of tickets will result in the seizure and cancellation of the ticket without compensation. * Valid identification indicating the ticket buyer's identity is required for admission to the event. Failure to present such identification will result in denial of entry, and no refunds will be provided. * VIP STAGE SEATING is sold exclusively in pairs, with a maximum of two pairs (four tickets) per purchase. Groups larger than four will be seated in the general admission area. Due to its close proximity to the stage, this section has a zero-tolerance policy for heckling and loud talking. DISRUPTIVE GUESTS WILL BE REMOVED FROM THE EVENT. If you have any questions or concerns, please email [events@thestandupclub.com](mailto:events@thestandupclub.com) or call [(562) 202-9944](tel:5622029944).

I realize that this I.D. policy is required by law and not subject to staff discretion.

name: Writers Night hosted by Steve Goodie
description: ***Please note, when you make a reservation at The Bluebird Cafe, you are agreeing to the following terms & conditions: - Ticket reservations at The Bluebird Cafe are an agreement to pay the cover charge and applicable taxes/fees and to meet the $15.00 per seat food and/or drink minimum. - If you are a no show, we reserve the right to charge your credit card for the $15.00 minimum for each seat in your reservation. - Ticket reservations are for your personal use. They are NOT transferrable and NOT for resale! We perform random I.D. checks and the name on the reservation must match the name on the I.D. - Cancel at least 48 hours before showtime to receive a refund of the ticket price and tax (ticketing fees are non-refundable). Please call (615-383-1461) or email (info@bluebirdcafe.com) to cancel your reservation. - Attendees are expected to show up by the start of the show for which they have tickets. Seats that are unclaimed once the show has started will be seated from the walk-up line. - Performers are subject to change. - Bar seats are only for customers 21 years of age or older. - Any guest under the age of 18 must be seated with a parent or guardian. - We require accessible seat requests to be made two weeks in advance of the show date for guaranteed accessible seats. If you made a reservation outside of that window using our online system, please call The Bluebird Cafe during office hours and we will do our best to accommodate your needs. Please know that if you reserved outside of the two week window, accessible seats are not guaranteed. - The Bluebird Cafe is a listening room. If you do not honor our SHHHH! policy (being quiet while the performers are on stage) you may be asked to leave. - No outside food and/or drink is allowed inside the venue. - Still photography is allowed, unless the artist requests otherwise. - RECORDING COPYRIGHTED MATERIAL (VIDEO OR AUDIO) IS PROHIBITED. - We have a small lot directly in front of the cafe and a larger gravel lot behind the cafe. To access our gravel lot, please use the alley entrance on Hillsboro Pike next to United Community Bank. Please do not utilize our neighbors' parking lots, as they enforce towing and do NOT park at the bank unless after 4:30 PM. All guests must enter and check in through our main entrance on Hillsboro Pike. - For the safety and comfort of all our guests, Bluebird Cafe management has the right to refuse service to anyone who is aggressive, hostile or appears to be intoxicated.

name: Arrebol
description: ARREBOL es una pieza escénica que nace en el umbral entre el día y la noche. En cuatro escenas, la obra transita de la penumbra y la espera al surgimiento de los colores cálidos como pulsión vital y revelación interior. El viaje alcanza una fusión intensa de energía y emoción, para luego disolverse lentamente en el silencio, dejando en el aire la fragilidad, la belleza y la promesa de un nuevo comienzo. La pieza invita a habitar el color como emoción y a contemplar lo que permanece cuando todo parece desvanecerse.

name: Arrebol
description: ARREBOL es una pieza escénica que nace en el umbral entre el día y la noche. En cuatro escenas, la obra transita de la penumbra y la espera al surgimiento de los colores cálidos como pulsión vital y revelación interior. El viaje alcanza una fusión intensa de energía y emoción, para luego disolverse lentamente en el silencio, dejando en el aire la fragilidad, la belleza y la promesa de un nuevo comienzo. La pieza invita a habitar el color como emoción y a contemplar lo que permanece cuando todo parece desvanecerse.

name: Arrebol
description: ARREBOL es una pieza escénica que nace en el umbral entre el día y la noche. En cuatro escenas, la obra transita de la penumbra y la espera al surgimiento de los colores cálidos como pulsión vital y revelación interior. El viaje alcanza una fusión intensa de energía y emoción, para luego disolverse lentamente en el silencio, dejando en el aire la fragilidad, la belleza y la promesa de un nuevo comienzo. La pieza invita a habitar el color como emoción y a contemplar lo que permanece cuando todo parece desvanecerse.

name: Raptors Fan Access Plus Ups: Announce Visiting Team Lineup
description: **FAN ACCESS PLUS UP ONLY. GAME TICKET REQUIRED AND NOT INCLUDED** A lucky fan (ages 8-14) will sit courtside next to Herbie and get the honor of announcing the visiting team's starting lineup at a Raptors home game. It's your chance to bring the energy, have some fun on the mic, and maybe even throw in a little extra flair while the crowd shows the visitors what home-court advantage really sounds like.

name: Raptors Fan Access Plus Ups: Courtside Access for Team Warmups
description: **FAN ACCESS PLUS UP ONLY. GAME TICKET REQUIRED AND NOT INCLUDED** See Scotiabank Arena in all its pre-game buzz glory, right from the floor. Watch the Raptors and the visiting team go through their pre-game warmups and shooting drills from your very own courtside seat. You'll be close enough to hear all the chatter between players, coaches and media, you might even snag your own scoop.

name: Raptors Fan Access Plus Ups: Starting Lineup Sheet
description: **FAN ACCESS PLUS UP ONLY. GAME TICKET REQUIRED AND NOT INCLUDED** Fans will have the chance to take home a special keepsake - an exclusive copy of the official starting lineup from a Raptors game. Bonus points if you take it home and dramatically read it out loud like one of our announcers - crowd noise optional, bragging rights guaranteed.

name: Raptors Fan Access Plus Ups: Post Game On-Court Photo
description: **FAN ACCESS PLUS UP ONLY. GAME TICKET REQUIRED AND NOT INCLUDED** Stick around after the final buzzer to get your photo taken on Raptors hardwood - fresh sneaker scuffs included. Bring your tunnel fit and A game, and we'll handle the rest.

name: Raptors Fan Access Plus Ups: On-Court Flag Bearer
description: **FAN ACCESS PLUS UP ONLY. GAME TICKET REQUIRED AND NOT INCLUDED** Lead the charge as the official Flag Bearer at a Raptors game (ages 8-12), standing proudly on the court as your Raptors take the court. With Raptors fans roaring behind you, this unforgettable moment puts you in the heart of the action - and requires more heart than upper-body strength.

name: An Evening with Brian McKnight
description: Presented By: 805 Productions * MY780 Creative * One Six Eight Events 18+ Event. A physical copy of a valid government photo ID is required. The SVIP Meet and Greet Package is available for sale. Join us for an unforgettable night with Grammy Award?winning R&B legend Brian McKnight, live in concert. Known for his smooth vocals, timeless love songs, and exceptional musicianship, Brian McKnight will take audiences on an intimate musical journey featuring his greatest hits, fan favorites, and heartfelt storytelling. This special evening promises a refined, soulful experience celebrating decades of iconic music. Brian McKnight is one of the most successful and respected R&B artists of his generation. With a career spanning over three decades, he has earned 16 Grammy Award nominations, sold millions of albums worldwide, and delivered a catalog of timeless classics, including ?Back at One,? ?One Last Cry,? ?Anytime,? and ?Love of My Life.?

name: Les soirées Jazz Cabaret Chic x Rémi Bolduc Trio
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Abba Revisited
description: Experience the magic of ABBA like never before with ABBA Revisited, the ultimate tribute show celebrating the unforgettable music of the legendary Swedish pop group. Featuring a dynamic cast of talented performers, ABBA Revisited perfectly captures the look, sound, and energy of ABBAs iconic performances, transporting audiences back to the height of disco and pop. Having performed to sold-out crowds across the globe, ABBA Revisited has earned international acclaim and repeat invitations to stages worldwide. Their faithful renditions and vibrant stage presence have made them a fan favorite everywhere they go, delighting both lifelong ABBA fans and new generations discovering the music for the first time. From chart-topping anthems like Dancing Queen, Mamma Mia, and Waterloo, this show is packed with nostalgia, energy, and fun. Whether you're singing along, dancing in your seat, or simply soaking in the spectacle, ABBA Revisited is an unforgettable experience!

description: Net Capacity: 5865 By purchasing this ticket, you give permission to use your likeness. The Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour 100 Years of Thrills. 100 Years of Laughs. 100 Years of Joy This is a once-in-a-century celebration of 100 Years of Jaw-Dropping No Way! moves, 100 Years of Wow! and 100 Years of Heart-Pounding Thrills! The Harlem Globetrotters are coming to your city with their most LEGENDARY TOUR EVER. From gravity-defying dunks to game-changing tricks, experience the team that redefined basketball! This is history you can feel and a celebration of 100 years of over-the-top FUN with all-new surprises like the Golden Basketball by Spalding®. This is fan celebration from the moment you arrive with epic new pre-game magic, unforgettable post-game interactions, and the most fan-fueled experience in sports. This is your only chance to be part of The Harlem Globetrotters 100 Year Tour. Dont miss your chance to be a part of the LEGACY.

name: Hommage à Buena Vista Social Club
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Queen of Soul Motown Disco - Michelle Sweeney
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Crowd Lu "HeartBreakFast" World Tour
description: The acclaimed singer-songwriter Crowd Lu is bringing his "HeartBreakFast" World Tour to Vancouver. Through tender storytelling and evocative melodies, Crowd Lu voice to the quiet loneliness of those drifting through modern city life. Crowd Lu "HeartBreakFast" World Tour in Vancouver will be held on 21 April 2026, 8PM (PST) at the Show Theatre at River Rock Casino Resort. The ticket prices are CAD 238 (CAT 1), CAD 168 (CAT 2), CAD 98 (CAT 3). Applicable taxes and service fees will be applied at checkout. Public ticket sales will commence on 11 February 2026 at 11AM (PST). Doors 7:00PM. Show 8:00PM. Smoking and/vaping is not permitted. No outside food or beverages.

name: Les soirées Jazz Cabaret Chic - Maude Fortier Quartet
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. name: Annie
description: Net Capacity: 395 Leapin Lizards! The irrepressible comic strip heroine takes center stage in one of the worlds best-loved musicals. With equal measures of pluck and positivity, little orphan Annie charms everyones hearts despite a next-to-nothing start in 1930s New York City. She is determined to find the parents who abandoned her years ago on the doorstep of a New York City Orphanage that is run by the cruel embittered Miss Hannigan. With the help of the other girls in the Orphanage, Annie escapes to the wondrous world of NYC. In adventure after fun-filled adventure, Annie foils Miss Hannigans evil machinations.. and even befriends President Franklin Delano Roosevelt! She finds a new home and family in billionaire, Oliver Warbucks, his personal secretary, Grace Farrell, and a lovable mutt named Sandy. Annie is the perfect family-friendly musical. Rated G

description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Bhajanam On Worldone Stage
description: Bhajanam on the WorldOne Stage by Nick Pandya & Band for World Peace is a unique acoustic devotional music experience taking place on April 24, 2026, at the historic Winter Garden Theatre in downtown Toronto. Presented by WorldOne Events Foundation, the event introduces the world?s first Acoustic Bhajan Experience Concert, creating an intimate musical atmosphere while sharing a message of unity and world peace through devotional music. For accessible bookings and support by phone or email, contact the TO Live Box Office team at 416-366-7723 | 1-800-708-6754 | boxoffice@tolive.com. name: The Fab Four
description: If you want to experience the best Beatles tribute ever, you wont want to miss The Fab Four-The Ultimate Tribute. The Emmy Award-winning Fab Four is elevated far above every other Beatles Tribute due to their precise attention to detail. With uncanny, note-for-note live renditions of Beatles classics such as Cant Buy Me Love, Yesterday, A Day In The Life, Twist And Shout, Here Comes The Sun, and Hey Jude, the Fab Four will make you think you are watching the real thing. Their incredible stage performances include three costume changes representing every era of the Beatles ever-changing career, and this loving tribute to the Beatles has amazed audiences in countries around the world, including Japan, Australia, France, Hong Kong, The United Kingdom, Germany, Mexico and Brazil. The Fab Four is truly the Ultimate tribute.

name: L'Ultime Soirée Disco Chic
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Fred Penner: The Cat Came Back with the Mississauga Symphony Orchestra
description: Calling all Fred Heads! Join 4-time Juno Award winner Fred Penner for a special performance celebrating his iconic song, "The Cat Came Back" in a one-of-a-kind collaboration with the Mississauga Symphony Orchestra. With over 40 years in the music industry, Fred Penner has touched the hearts of generations through his 13 beloved albums, his timeless TV series Fred Penners Place, and his engaging live shows. Known for his ability to inspire and uplift, Fred continues to bring joy to families across North America with his music and positive messages. In this exclusive performance, Freds classic songs will be brought to life alongside the dynamic sound of the Mississauga Symphony Orchestra. Blending symphonic richness with Freds signature style, this collaboration creates a powerful musical experience that celebrates artistry and the timeless ability of music to connect us all. Dont miss this unforgettable afternoon of music that unites generations, hearts, and a shared love of live

name: Annie
description: Net Capacity: 395 Leapin Lizards! The irrepressible comic strip heroine takes center stage in one of the worlds best-loved musicals. With equal measures of pluck and positivity, little orphan Annie charms everyones hearts despite a next-to-nothing start in 1930s New York City. She is determined to find the parents who abandoned her years ago on the doorstep of a New York City Orphanage that is run by the cruel embittered Miss Hannigan. With the help of the other girls in the Orphanage, Annie escapes to the wondrous world of NYC. In adventure after fun-filled adventure, Annie foils Miss Hannigans evil machinations.. and even befriends President Franklin Delano Roosevelt! She finds a new home and family in billionaire, Oliver Warbucks, his personal secretary, Grace Farrell, and a lovable mutt named Sandy. Annie is the perfect family-friendly musical. Rated G

name: Bear Grease
description: A Fearless, Funny, and Deeply Heartfelt Reimagining of Grease, this Rez-ed Up Remix Swaps 1950s Greasers and Pink Ladies for a Cast That Proudly Spotlights Indigenous Language, Music, and Moves with Broadway Flair. Bear Grease reimagines the iconic 1971 musical Grease through a bold and comedic native lens. This all-Indigenous musical parody infuses hip-hop and comedy into a pow wow-powered love story that's equal parts hilarious homage and cultural celebration. Captivating audiences across North America Bear Grease has had over 200 successful performances over 4 incredible years, and is also the longest running (and only the 2nd) all-Indigenous musical to ever debut Off-Broadway. The beloved songs of Grease are revitalized with vibrant cultural expression and Cree (Nêhiyawêwin) language: Hopelessly Devoted becomes a soul-stirring round dance, Bear Grease Lightning bursts with Traditional, Grass, Chicken, and Fancy footwork, and Wichihin delivers a powerful new take on Stand by me.

name: Les soirées Jazz Cabaret Chic x  Darrell Green Sextet
description: Bienvenue et Welcome au cabaret ! LE BALCON cabaret chic est une salle de spectacle emblématique, située à l'intérieur de la majestueuse église Saint James, au centre-ville de Montréal. Une occasion unique de choisir votre formule : - déguster une savoureuse table d'hôte en souper-spectacle (trois services), aux premières loges, ou bien - assister au spectacle en dégustant un cocktail signature sur la mezzanine qui surplombe la scène. Ce lieu sans égal à Montréal, vous promet une soirée mémorable, intime et festive. Welcome and Bienvenue to the cabaret! The chic cabaret LE BALCON is an emblematic venue located inside the majestic Saint James Church in downtown Montreal. A unique opportunity to choose your formula: - enjoy a tasty three-course table d'hôte dinner and show (three courses), from the front row, or - enjoy the show with a signature cocktail on the mezzanine overlooking the stage. This unparalleled venue in Montreal promises a memorable, intimate and festive evening.

name: Burlington Teen Tour Band
description: Net Capacity: 2,181 All persons entering a OVG Hamilton venue 13 years of age and under must be accompanied by a companion 16 years of age or older. Children under the age of 2 years old, do not require a ticket but they must sit on a guardian's lap. Please note all seating areas of FOCH require the use of stairs except the mezzanine. Please call us at 905-546-3100 and/or use the filters to search for accessible options. First Balcony - Row Q and Second Balcony - Row M are accessible friendly (require no stairs) for those with walkers/canes but are NOT wheelchair accessible. For more information on Hamilton Arena, FirstOntario Concert Hall, The Studio [CLICK HERE!](HTTP://WWW.FIRSTONTARIOCONCERTHALL.CA)
